zh.lifeSummary: 當Denise de Déols於從1172年到1173年出生在法國崔傑桑瑟時，她的父親Raoul de Deols31歲，母親Agnes de Charenton21歲。她於大約1187年與Baldwin de Redvers Earl of Devon在法國貝里結婚。她去世於1221年，埋葬在法國崔英德代爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Denise de Déols于从1172年到1173年出生在法国崔傑桑瑟时，她的父亲Raoul de Deols31岁，母亲Agnes de Charenton21岁。她于大约1187年与Baldwin de Redvers Earl of Devon在法国貝里结婚。她去世于1221年，埋葬在法国崔英德代爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Déols
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Santos, Reyes, Angeles, Cristina, Efren, Jose, Orestes, Santos Jose.  French Achille, Jacques, Pierre.

Hispanic: abstracted as a surname from fused preposition de ‘of’ and definite article los ‘the’ (in plural), common components of Spanish surnames (as in e.g. De los Santos ). — Note: It is possible that (in some cases) this is counted as an independent surname only in the population figure published by the US Census Bureau.

Catalan (Delós or Delòs): variant of d'Alós or d'Alòs, habitational names from any of the towns named with those words, as for example Alós d'Isil (in the district of El Pallars) or Alòs de Balaguer (in the district of La Noguera), in Catalonia.

variants.name: De los Santos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Francisco, Carlos, Mario, Armando, Pedro, Raul, Jesus, Roberto.
Spanish: from de los Santos, literally ‘of the saints’, a common element of personal names, originally denoting a child born or baptized on All Saints' Day (see Santos 1).

nameMeanings.name: Denise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

variants.name: Denyse
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

en.lifeSummary: When Denise de Déols was born from 1172 to 1173, in Sancerre, Cher, Centre, France, her father, Raoul de Deols, was 31 and her mother, Agnes de Charenton, was 21. She married Baldwin de Redvers Earl of Devon about 1187, in Berry, France. She died in 1221, and was buried in Déols, Indre, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Denise de Déols est née du 1172 au 1173, à Sancerre, Cher, Centre, France, son père, Raoul de Deols, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Charenton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Baldwin de Redvers Earl of Devon environ 1187, à Berry, France. Elle est décédée en 1221, et a été enterrée à Déols, Indre, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Denise de Déols von 1172 bis 1173 in Sancerre, Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul de Deols 31 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Charenton 21. Sie hat um 1187 in Berry, Frankreich Baldwin de Redvers Earl of Devon geheiratet. Sie starb 1221 und wurde in Déols, Indre, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Denise de Déols è nata il da 1172 a 1173 nel Sancerre, Cher, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Raoul de Deols, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Charenton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Baldwin de Redvers Earl of Devon circa 1187, nel Berry, Francia. Morì nel 1221, e fu sepolta a Déols, Indre, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Denise de Déolsがから1172年まで1173年にフランスセントアチャーサンセアで生まれた時，父Raoul de Deolsは31歳，母Agnes de Charentonは21歳であった。約1187年にフランスバーリーでBaldwin de Redvers Earl of Devonと結婚した。彼女は1221年に死去し，フランスセントアインダードeオルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Denise de Déols(이)가 1172년 부터 1173년 까지 프랑스 세트르 처 산서르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul de Deols(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Charenton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1187년 프랑스 베리에서 Baldwin de Redvers Earl of Devon(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1221년 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 인드르 드e스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Denise de Déols nasceu de 1172 a 1173, em Sancerre, Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Raoul de Deols, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Charenton, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Baldwin de Redvers Earl of Devon aproximadamente 1187, em Berry, França. Ela faleceu em 1221, e foi sepultada em Déols, Indre, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Denise de Déols родилась с 1172 по 1173 в местности сансирр, чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul de Deols было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Charenton, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baldwin de Redvers Earl of Devon около 1187 г. в местности бирри, Франция. Она умерла в 1221 г. и была похоронена в местности дeолс, индр, кентр, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Denise de Déols nació desde 1172 hasta 1173, en Sancerre, Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Raoul de Deols, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes de Charenton, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Baldwin de Redvers Earl of Devon aproximadamente 1187, en Berry, Francia. Murió en 1221, y fue sepultada en Déols, Indre, Centre, Francia.
